arts.ttl: I heard what Daniel Farke told reporters - it highlights Chris Wilder’s error
arts.sum: Daniel Farke half-joked after the draw with Luton Town that he was partly appointed as Leeds United manager to keep the cool amidst the emotion. He added: “Overall it's important in this hectic business, and especially when you play for such an emotional club like Leeds United, that you take the decisions not just out of the motions [sic] but more in an objective and neutral way.”

arts.ttl: Leeds United's transfer interest in Bundesliga star could spell trouble for Ilia Gruev
arts.sum: Leeds United know there's work still to be done this season but will have one eye on preparing for life in the Premier League next season with interest in Borussia Monchengladbach captain Julian Weigl. After arriving at the club in the summer of 2023 from Werder Bremen, Gruev has played 56 times for Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Championship Team of the Season prediction
arts.sum: The Player of the Season nominees have been confirmed for this season too as Dan James (Leeds), Gustavo Hamer (Sheffield United), and James Trafford (Burnley) – due to be announced on April 27th. Daniel Farke and Scott Parker are currently going head-to-head for the Championship title in the final four matches of the season while Chris Wilder’s Sheffield United will be hoping to stage a late fightback for automatic promotion.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Farke teases Dan James boost
arts.sum: Leeds United team news pre-Oxford United: Will Dan James feature tonight? Leeds and Daniel Farke will know tonight will not be a walk in the park, given that their solid top two standing was helped by Oxford beating Sheffield United at home earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI vs Oxford United with Bamford and Piroe call made
arts.sum: Leeds United supporters received some good news ahead of Good Friday, with Daniel Farke confirming on Wednesday that Daniel James will be available for Monday’s home game against Stoke City. Predicted United XI vs Preston (4-2-3-1): Darlow; Bogle, Rodon, Ampadu, Firpo; Tanaka, Gruev; Gnonto, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe.

arts.ttl: Oxford vs Leeds Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Oxford, currently battling to cement their place in the Championship, face a daunting task as they host league leaders Leeds at the Kassam Stadium on Friday, April 18th, with kick-off scheduled for 20...

arts.ttl: Leeds United given warning about signing £45m Premier League misfit
arts.sum: Leeds United are chasing promotion to the Premier League and look the favourites to go up as winners of the Championship this season. That has inevitably seen transfer rumours starting ahead of what could be a big summer window for the Yorkshire outfit. Leeds will need to get the right signings in to strengthen their […] The post Leeds United given warning about signing £45m Premier League misfit appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Gary Rowett gives update on availability of defensive duo
arts.sum: OXFORD United defensive duo Elliott Moore and Hidde ter Avest are more likely to return on Easter Monday than against Leeds United tonight.

arts.ttl: Gary Rowett previews mega clash with Leeds United
arts.sum: OXFORD United have already shown this month that they can climb the biggest mountains that Sky Bet Championship has to offer, says head coach Gary Rowett.

arts.ttl: Leeds United faithful at Oxford can help set up Elland Road promotion scenario
arts.sum: First, Leeds must focus on the task in hand and that is exactly the drum Daniel Farke has been beating ever since that win over Preston North End. It was only two weeks ago that the U’s beat Sheffield United 1-0 on their own patch, having defeated Watford in their previous home match. Three points away at Oxford will hand Leeds the chance to earn promotion at home - either against Stoke City on Monday or against Bristol City a week later.
